questions.question: 4 (a) A substance cools from 50 °C to 5.0 °C. Its melting point is 20 °C. The substance takes 30 minutes to cool from 50 °C to its melting point. The substance takes a total time of 80 minutes to cool from 50 °C to 5.0 °C. On Fig. 4.1, sketch a graph that shows how the temperature of the substance varies with time as it cools from 50 °C to 5.
